title: uva-ursi × bracteata
intro: Uva-ursi × bracteata, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Uva-ursi plant, native to North America. The medicinal properties of Uva-ursi × bracteata lie in its astringent and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of arbutin and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for kidney and bladder issues. Uva-ursi × bracteata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide additional health benefits.
